The '''Joint Chiefs of Staff''' were the leaders of the various branches of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance's]] [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force|military forces]]. They included the [[Chief of Army Operations]], the [[Chief of Naval Operations]], and the [[Chief of Starfighter Command (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of Starfighter Command]]. The [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] served as chair of the joint chiefs.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{Mo}}
